title: The note
premise: A folded note where a wallet used to be.

stages.narration: There's a note folded small in the coat pocket, soft with handling, the ink gone feathery at the creases. It's addressed to a name. Whoever carried it read it a great many times.

choices.label: Read it, so at least someone did
Refold it and carry it a while

notes: the-dead. Bearing witness costs a beat and some grief but holds Humanity; carrying it is a small warmth; leaving is free but not weightless.
